emails.subject: Platform Lease -Reply
emails.body: Check out the attached response from Marathon concerning our revisions. I guess this is a new negotiation technique. Just ignore the counterparty's concerns. Let's discuss this before I call Brad back. Thanks. Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 05/30/2000 09:26 AM "Bradley G Penn" <bgpenn@marathonoil.com> 05/26/2000 10:00 AM

emails.subject: Re: Platform Lease -Reply
emails.body: Gerald, Excellent work!! The legal reasoning, advocacy and tone are first rate. I will be interested to hear how Brad (or more importantly, his lawyer) respond to this message. I would suggest that you forward a copy of this to Ted Bland, Chris Lindsey Mariner and Burlington's lawyer, whose name escapes me at the moment--Ted will remember and may have e:mail addresses. Thanks for handling so we. Steve Gerald Nemec 05/31/2000 01:04 PM
